summary: Completed comprehensive testing of The Modern Pantry smart expiry detection app. All core functionality working correctly including API endpoints, navigation, UI components, OCR processing, and localStorage history management.

ui_bugs.issue: Clear History button not visible in empty history state

integration_issues.issue: Camera modal doesn't open in testing environment (permissions issue)

passed_tests: All backend API endpoints (/api/health, /api/scan, /api/calculate-verdict) working correctly
Home page loads with hero section and navigation
Navigation between all pages (Home, Scan, History, Result) working
Scan page upload area and form inputs functional
Scan button properly disabled without image
Result page shows no-result state properly
History page shows empty state with correct messaging
History localStorage functionality working (add, display, clear)
Verdict badges display correct colors and text
Gemini Flash Vision OCR integration processing images successfully
Date extraction and verdict calculation algorithms working
Manual verdict calculation endpoint working for future and expired dates

minor_ui_fixes: Make Clear History button visible in empty history state for consistency
Investigate camera permissions handling for better user experience

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - Minor UI visibility issue with Clear History button
